details.summary: Added safeBind helper for parameterized SQL queries, extended DuckDBRawClient.all/get to accept optional params array, applied safe binding in createCLIClient
Converted all 6 functions from string-interpolated SQL to $N parameterized queries. Added Log import for table-missing logging.

Wired rankWorkingSetFull() as primary working set ranking with EventStore fallback. Added DuckDB + InvalidationBus to service dependencies. Registered working_set_ranking invalidation subscription handler.
